ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock (e.g., AAPL, GOOGL) */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trading session */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price during the session */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price during the session */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Total volume of shares traded */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Change in price compared to the previous trading day */,
  "percent_change" REAL /* Percentage change in price compared to the previous trading day */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility measure for the session */,
  "adjusted_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price to account for stock splits and dividends */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend paid on the trading day */,
  "split_coefficient" REAL /* Stock split coefficient for the day */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_data_stock_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("stock_symbol") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_symbol"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Unique symbol representing the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the company belongs */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry classification of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the company's headquarters */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial Public Offering date */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company website URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or application used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES stock_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the data source (if applicable) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update from this source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
